name: tech.aspid.mvvm
description: Aspid.MVVM is a powerful, high-performance MVVM framework for Unity, eliminating reflection, minimizing GC allocations, and removing boilerplate code for faster, streamlined development.

samples.description: Minimal end-to-end example wiring a View to a ViewModel.
Binding numeric stats with converters and bindable members.
Observable collection bound to a dynamic list of items.
Virtualized list efficiently rendering large data sets.
